assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for BFCM period and explicitly notes it blocks everything including security patches and has a 30-day maximum duration

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for the June code freeze and notes it blocks all upgrades including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion for ongoing minor upgrade control — allows CP patches but blocks disruptive changes
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades for year-round control and explicitly states it allows security patches on control plane but blocks disruptive changes

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions the 30-day maximum duration for no_upgrades exclusions and states the no_minor_or_node_upgrades exclusion can be extended up to the version's End of Support date

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with proper --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three scenarios (no_upgrades for June/BFCM, no_minor_or_node_upgrades for ongoing control)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the requirement to allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'You can still manually upgrade anytime using gcloud container clusters upgrade - exclusions only affect auto-upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
